/usr/bin/ar qc libethercat_core.a CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/master.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/loop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/devices/beckhoff/el2004/adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/devices/beckhoff/el3002/adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/devices/beckhoff/el5032/adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/devices/motor_drives/drive_bases/ds402/pdo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/devices/motor_drives/Novanta/Everest/pdo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/devices/motor_drives/Novanta/Everest/adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/devices/motor_drives/Novanta/Volcano/pdo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ethercat_core.dir/devices/motor_drives/Novanta/Volcano/adapter.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libethercat_core.a
